ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the module */,
  "repository" TEXT /* Repository where the module is stored */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch name of the module in the repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which this module belongs */,
  "last_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the last analysis for the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_overview ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_dates" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric entry being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for analysis */,
  "analyzed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the analysis */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the analyzed code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being monitored */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module to which this threshold applies */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch to which this threshold applies */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold that was breached */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_overview" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* Repository URL for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which this project belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which this branch belongs */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit on this branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the branch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the branch was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_overview ("project_id")
)
